commands.review_summary:
The PR updates `@steipete/sweet-cookie` to 0.4.0, two development dependencies, and the pnpm 10.x pin, then refreshes the lockfile and unreleased 0.8.1 changelog entry.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR performs dependency maintenance rather than fixing a reported current-main defect with a reproduction path.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the owner can merge after the required CI validation finishes successfully.

target.title: chore(deps): refresh dependency backstop
target.body:
## Summary

- Refresh bounded dependency backstop updates: `@steipete/sweet-cookie` 0.3.0 -> 0.4.0, `@types/node` 25.9.2 -> 25.9.3, `@typescript/native-preview` 7.0.0-dev.20260609.1 -> 7.0.0-dev.20260611.2, and `packageManager` pnpm 10.31.0 -> 10.34.3.
- Keep pnpm on the existing 10.x line instead of taking pnpm 11.
- Add the 0.8.1 changelog entry.

## Audit Notes

- Open issues: 0. Open PRs: 0.
- Latest release refreshed: v0.8.0, published 2026-06-10, includes changelog, npm tarball/integrity, and CI proof.
- Latest main CI refreshed: CI #351 on commit 20cf623, status Success.
- `pnpm outdated --format json` is empty after this change.
- `pnpm audit --audit-level high` reports no known vulnerabilities.

## Upstream Notes

- `@steipete/sweet-cookie` 0.4.0 adds multi-profile browser cookie selection and a dependency-free CLI; existing `getCookies` API usage remains compatible.
- `@types/node` 25.9.3 is a patch update from DefinitelyTyped.
- `@typescript/native-preview` is already an adopted dev toolchain prerelease in this repo; this only advances to the latest published dev build.
- pnpm 10.34.3 is the latest 10.x release and includes the repository-controlled `.npmrc` environment-variable security fix; pnpm 11 remains a separate major.

## Proof

- `pnpm exec vitest run src/lib/x-web.test.ts` -> 7 passed.
- `pnpm run check` -> format check and lint passed.
- `pnpm run typecheck` -> passed.
- `pnpm run build` -> passed.
- `pnpm test` -> 111 files / 1,048 tests passed.
- `pnpm run e2e` -> 12 Chromium tests passed.
- Built CLI wrapper against the real local Birdclaw DB with private JSON payloads reduced to counts: `db stats`, `search tweets --limit 1`, `dms list --limit 1`, rare-token tweet search, and rare-token DM search all completed.
- `npm pack --dry-run` -> package layout OK.
- Autoreview branch diff -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings.
- Public Model Identifier Gate -> PASS for diff and public PR text.

## Risks

- Low runtime risk: the only runtime package update preserves the current import boundary.
- Low toolchain risk: pnpm stays on 10.x; TypeScript native-preview remains on the repo's already-adopted dev channel.

## Recommendation

Land after CI is green, then delete `deps/freshness-2026-06-12`.
target.author: steipete
